query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_shorts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN articleId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_article,
  SUM(CASE WHEN articleId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_article,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sourceType = 'ai' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ai_shorts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sourceType = 'article' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as article_shorts
FROM shorts;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AGjn9SpCJUmEG7Z.root --database 6wzLmWaAhQKjEBEoadSqJc --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_shorts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN articleId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_article,
  SUM(CASE WHEN articleId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_article,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sourceType = 'ai' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ai_shorts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sourceType = 'article' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as article_shorts
FROM shorts;
